hooks.command: if [ -f docker-compose.yml ]; then echo '🔍 Docker環境チェック中...'; docker compose exec -T web bash -c 'echo "RAILS_ENV=$RAILS_ENV" && echo "DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL"' 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️ Dockerコンテナが起動していません'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rspec|db:test|db:drop'; then docker compose exec -T web bash -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo "⚠️ WARNING: DATABASE_URL is set: $DATABASE_URL"; echo "This may override RAILS_ENV-based database selection."; fi' 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.rb$'; then docker compose exec -T web bundle exec rubocop "$FILE" --format simple 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || true; fi
